mapper.insert: INSERT INTO referee_task ( schedule_id, referee_id, status, reason, apply_time, assign_time, start_time, complete_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{scheduleId}, #{refereeId}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{applyTime}, #{assignTime}, #{startTime}, #{completeTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT rt.*, p.name as project_name, u.real_name as referee_name, s.venue, s.date, s.time, s.status as schedule_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration r WHERE r.schedule_id = s.id) as participant_count FROM referee_task rt LEFT JOIN schedule s ON rt.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON rt.referee_id = u.id WHERE rt.id = #{id}

SELECT rt.*, p.name as project_name, u.real_name as referee_name, s.venue, s.date, s.time, s.status as schedule_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration r WHERE r.schedule_id = s.id) as participant_count FROM referee_task rt LEFT JOIN schedule s ON rt.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON rt.referee_id = u.id WHERE rt.referee_id = #{refereeId} ORDER BY rt.create_time DESC

SELECT rt.*, p.name as project_name, u.real_name as referee_name, s.venue, s.date, s.time, s.status as schedule_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration r WHERE r.schedule_id = s.id) as participant_count FROM referee_task rt LEFT JOIN schedule s ON rt.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON rt.referee_id = u.id WHERE rt.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY rt.create_time DESC

SELECT rt.*, p.name as project_name, u.real_name as referee_name, s.venue, s.date, s.time, s.status as schedule_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration r WHERE r.schedule_id = s.id) as participant_count FROM referee_task rt LEFT JOIN schedule s ON rt.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON rt.referee_id = u.id ORDER BY rt.create_time DESC

SELECT rt.*, p.name as project_name, u.real_name as referee_name, s.venue, s.date, s.time, s.status as schedule_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration r WHERE r.schedule_id = s.id) as participant_count FROM referee_task rt LEFT JOIN schedule s ON rt.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON rt.referee_id = u.id WHERE rt.status = #{status} ORDER BY rt.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE referee_task SET schedule_id = #{scheduleId}, referee_id = #{refereeId}, status = #{status}, reason = #{reason}, apply_time = #{applyTime}, assign_time = #{assignTime}, start_time = #{startTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT rt.*, p.name as project_name, u.real_name as referee_name, s.venue, s.date, s.time, s.status as schedule_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration r WHERE r.schedule_id = s.id) as participant_count FROM referee_task rt LEFT JOIN schedule s ON rt.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON rt.referee_id = u.id WHERE rt.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND rt.referee_id = #{refereeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM referee_task WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM referee_task WHERE referee_id = #{refereeId}

SELECT u.id, u.real_name, u.username, u.phone, u.email, u.status, COUNT(rt.id) as task_count FROM user u LEFT JOIN referee_task rt ON u.id = rt.referee_id AND rt.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ONGOING') WHERE UPPER(u.role) = 'REFEREE' AND (u.status = 'active' OR u.status = '1' OR u.status = 1) GROUP BY u.id, u.real_name, u.username, u.phone, u.email, u.status ORDER BY task_count ASC, u.real_name ASC
